ssm.patchbaseline.patchfilter.Key.Description: The key for the filter.  For information about valid keys, see [PatchFilter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/systems-manager/latest/APIReference/API_PatchFilter.html) in the *AWS Systems Manager API Reference*.

ssm.patchbaseline.patchfilter.Values.Description: The value for the filter key.  For information about valid values for each key based on operating system type, see [PatchFilter](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/systems-manager/latest/APIReference/API_PatchFilter.html) in the *AWS Systems Manager API Reference*.
